However, looking at the ground-truth ratings, there's no exact match for 'casual eateries' as a category. The closest match would be considering this as general dining at various gluten-free friendly establishments, but since no specific restaurant name is given in the final package that matches the ground-truth restaurant list, I cannot map this to a specific rating.

5. **Destination**: The package mentions 'European destination as per Option A package (Cityscape Hotel area)' but doesn't specify which European city. Without knowing the exact destination city, I cannot map this to any of the specific destination ratings (Barcelona, Athens, Lisbon, etc.).

Given that I can only map items that are explicitly named in the final package to their corresponding ratings in the ground-truth data, I can only map: Economy Class flight, Cityscape Hotel, and Rock Climbing.
